_meta.notes: Half-dwarven innkeeper at Three Notches. Runs the only inn at the foot of the pass.

tagline: tall enough for the dwarven north wing, short enough for the human south one. genuinely kind.

firstMeet.subject: the south wing is warmer this season
firstMeet.body:
I run the only inn at the foot of the pass, so I see most of the people who come up. I do not write to most of them. I am writing to you because you took the south wing and didn't ask why. The dwarven north is colder than I let on, and the south is the right answer this season. 

If you come back, the south wing has a small library nobody uses. The kettle is by the second window.

— Bren

metadata.voice: warm, attentive, switches between dwarven wind-pace and human direct-pace by guest
